text.title: Planning-Layer Specification Checklist
text.summary: 5-phase planning checklist for AI-assisted spec writing at the SDD planning layer: intent capture through human approval.

list.item: Describe the problem or feature clearly in natural language
Identify product context: domain, target users
List business constraints
Document technical constraints: stack, existing APIs, DB schema
Define success criteria
Identify stakeholders: who approves this spec
State explicit out-of-scope exclusions before prompting AI
Prepare context prompt: product, users, constraints, out-of-scope
Request functional requirements in FR-X format (FR-1, FR-2, ...)
Review AI-generated requirements for completeness and correctness
Request edge case enumeration: "what could go wrong"
Validate edge cases against domain knowledge
Request Given-When-Then acceptance criteria for each requirement
Verify each criterion is testable without ambiguity
Use standard spec.md template
Document all functional requirements with FR-X IDs
Write user stories: As [user], I want [action], so that [benefit]
List dependencies explicitly
Mark constraints as testable and measurable
Define scope clearly: what is NOT included
Note potential risks
All functional requirements have acceptance criteria
Edge cases documented and handled
Dependencies listed
Constraints are measurable
Scope boundaries explicit
No conflicting requirements (run AI consistency check)
FR count stable after any AI refinement pass
Review AI-generated content against domain knowledge
Verify completeness with product team
Get stakeholder sign-off
Address feedback — run diff on FR list to verify no silent drops
Commit approved spec to git
Only then generate implementation-plan.md task breakdown
